import subprocess
result = subprocess.run\(['python3', '-m', 'playwright', 'install', '--dry-run'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10\)
print\(result.stdout[:500]\)
print\(result.stderr[:500]\)
" 2>&1; source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
import asyncio
async def test\(\):
    try:
        async with async_playwright\(\) as p:
            browser = await p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
            print\('Chromium launched OK'\)
            await browser.close\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Playwright launch failed: {e}'\)
asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

cd = d['card_details']
print\('=== CARD DETAILS ==='\)
print\(f\\"Subject:  {cd['subject']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Year:     {cd['year']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Brand:    {cd['brand']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Variety:  {cd['variety']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Card #:   {cd['card_number']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Grade:    {cd['full_grade']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Pop:      {cd['pop']} \(higher: {cd['pop_higher']}\)\\"\)
print\(f\\"Image:    {cd.get\('image_url','none'\)[:80]}\\"\)

ms = d.get\('market_summary', {}\)
print\(\)
print\('=== MARKET SUMMARY ==='\)
for k,v in \(ms or {}\).items\(\):
    print\(f\\"  {k}: {v}\\"\)

sales = d.get\('sales_data', []\)
print\(\)
print\(f'=== SALES DATA \({len\(sales\)} total\) ==='\)
for s in sales[:20]:
    title = s.get\('title',''\)[:55].replace\('&nbsp',''\).strip\(\)
    date = s.get\('date',''\)[:16]
    print\(f\\"  \\${s['price']:>9,.2f}  {date:<18s} {s.get\('source',''\):<10s} {title}\\"\)
if len\(sales\) > 20:
    print\(f'  ... and {len\(sales\)-20} more'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/lookup/PSA/85028490" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
cd = d['card_details']
ms = d.get\('market_summary', {}\)
sales = d.get\('sales_data', []\)

print\('=== FRONTEND DATA CHECK ==='\)
print\(f'Card image URL: {cd.get\(\\"image_url\\", \\"NONE\\"\)[:80]}'\)
print\(f'Image will render: {\\"yes\\" if cd.get\(\\"image_url\\"\) else \\"NO - will show placeholder\\"}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Sales count: {len\(sales\)}'\)
print\(f'Sales with prices: {sum\(1 for s in sales if s.get\(\\"price\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Sales with dates: {sum\(1 for s in sales if s.get\(\\"date\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Sales with titles: {sum\(1 for s in sales if s.get\(\\"title\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Sales with URLs: {sum\(1 for s in sales if s.get\(\\"url\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Market Summary \(displayed as-is\):'\)
for k,v in \(ms or {}\).items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
print\(\)

# Show the outlier problem
prices = sorted\([s['price'] for s in sales if s.get\('price'\) and s['price'] > 5]\)
n = len\(prices\)
if n:
    median = prices[n//2]
    outliers = [p for p in prices if p > median * 10]
    non_outliers = [p for p in prices if p <= median * 10]
    print\(f'Median: \\${median}'\)
    print\(f'Current avg \(all\): \\${sum\(prices\)/n:.2f}'\)
    print\(f'Outliers \(>10x median\): {len\(outliers\)} items: {outliers}'\)
    print\(f'Filtered avg \(no outliers\): \\${sum\(non_outliers\)/len\(non_outliers\):.2f}' if non_outliers else 'no data'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/lookup/PSA/85028490" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json

d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
cd = d['card_details']
ms = d.get\('market_summary', {}\)
sales = d.get\('sales_data', []\)

print\('=== CERT 85028490 FULL FRONTEND SIMULATION ==='\)
print\(\)

# 1. Card details + image
print\('1. CARD HERO'\)
print\(f'   Subject: {cd[\\"subject\\"]}'\)
print\(f'   Set: {cd[\\"year\\"]} {cd[\\"brand\\"]} {cd[\\"variety\\"]}'\)
print\(f'   Grade: {cd[\\"full_grade\\"]}'\)
print\(f'   Image: {\\"YES\\" if cd.get\(\\"image_url\\"\) else \\"NO \(placeholder\)\\"}'\)
if cd.get\('image_url'\):
    print\(f'   Image URL: {cd[\\"image_url\\"][:80]}'\)
print\(\)

# 2. Simulate JS outlier filter
prices = sorted\([s['price'] for s in sales if s.get\('price'\) and s['price'] > 5]\)
n = len\(prices\)
median = prices[n//2] if n >= 3 else 0
cap = median * 10
filtered_prices = [p for p in prices if p <= cap]
outlier_count = n - len\(filtered_prices\)
fn = len\(filtered_prices\)

print\('2. MARKET SUMMARY \(after outlier filter\)'\)
print\(f'   Raw API avg:      \\${ms[\\"avg_price\\"]:,.2f}'\)
print\(f'   Filtered avg:     \\${sum\(filtered_prices\)/fn:,.2f}' if fn else '   Filtered avg: N/A'\)
print\(f'   Median:           \\${filtered_prices[fn//2]:,.2f}' if fn else '   Median: N/A'\)
print\(f'   Low:              \\${filtered_prices[0]:,.2f}' if fn else '   Low: N/A'\)
print\(f'   High:             \\${filtered_prices[-1]:,.2f}' if fn else '   High: N/A'\)
print\(f'   Sales displayed:  {fn} \(removed {outlier_count} outliers\)'\)
print\(\)

# 3. Sales list sample
filtered_sales = [s for s in sales if not s.get\('price'\) or s['price'] <= cap]
print\(f'3. RECENT SALES \({len\(filtered_sales\)} displayed\)'\)
for s in filtered_sales[:8]:
    src = s.get\('source',''\)
    title = s.get\('title',''\)[:50].replace\('&nbsp',''\).strip\(\)
    print\(f'   \\${s[\\"price\\"]:>8,.2f}  {s.get\(\\"date\\",\\"\\"\)[:16]:<18s}  {src:<10s}  {title}'\)
if len\(filtered_sales\) > 8:
    print\(f'   ... +{len\(filtered_sales\)-8} more'\)
print\(\)

# 4. Chart will render with filtered sales
print\(f'4. PRICE CHART: {len\(filtered_sales\)} data points \(outliers excluded\)'\)
print\(\)

# 5. AI Analyst gets filtered avg
avg_for_ai = sum\(filtered_prices\)/fn if fn else 0
print\(f'5. AI ANALYST will receive:'\)
print\(f'   Avg sale: \\${avg_for_ai:,.2f} \(filtered, not \\${ms[\\"avg_price\\"]:,.2f}\)'\)
print\(f'   Range: \\${filtered_prices[0]:,.2f} - \\${filtered_prices[-1]:,.2f}'\)
print\(f'   Sales count: {fn}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/lookup/PSA/85028490" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json

d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
sales = d.get\('sales_data', []\)
ms = d.get\('market_summary', {}\)

# Backend stats
print\(f'Backend returned: {len\(sales\)} sales, avg=\\${ms.get\(\\"avg_price\\",0\):,.2f}, median=\\${ms.get\(\\"median_price\\",0\):,.2f}'\)

# Simulate JS filterOutlierSales
prices = sorted\([s['price'] for s in sales if s.get\('price'\) and s['price'] > 5]\)
n = len\(prices\)
if n >= 3:
    median = prices[n//2]
    cap = median * 10
    filtered = [p for p in prices if p <= cap]
    removed = [p for p in prices if p > cap]
    fn = len\(filtered\)
    new_avg = sum\(filtered\)/fn if fn else 0
    print\(f'Median: \\${median:,.2f}, Cap \(10x\): \\${cap:,.2f}'\)
    print\(f'Outliers removed: {len\(removed\)}' + \(f' \({removed}\)' if removed else ''\)\)
    print\(f'Frontend displays: avg=\\${new_avg:,.2f}, median=\\${filtered[fn//2]:,.2f}, low=\\${filtered[0]:,.2f}, high=\\${filtered[-1]:,.2f}'\)
else:
    print\('Too few prices to filter'\)
" 2>&1)
